questionText:
What is the screen of a computer?
Qu'est-ce que l'écran d'un ordinateur ?
options: The part you look at to see information.
The part you use to click.
explanation: The screen is the part you look at to see information. It is like a television for the computer.

questionText:
Which part of the computer is used to type text?
Quelle partie de l'ordinateur est utilisée pour taper du texte ?
explanation: The keyboard is used to type text. You press the keys to write words and numbers.

questionText:
What is the function of a mouse?
Quelle est la fonction d'une souris ?
options: To move the cursor and click on items.
explanation: The mouse is used to move the cursor on the screen and click on items to select or open them.

questionText:
Which part of the computer is used to print documents?
Quelle partie de l'ordinateur est utilisée pour imprimer des documents ?
explanation: A printer is used to print documents on paper. It produces a physical copy of what you see on the screen.
CPU stands for Central Processing Unit. It is the brain of the computer, where all the calculations and instructions are processed.

questionText:
Which of these is a storage device?
Lequel de ces éléments est un périphérique de stockage ?
explanation: A hard disk drive is a storage device where you save your files and data. It stores information permanently.

questionText:
What is the meaning of the word 'click' in computer vocabulary?
Que signifie le mot 'click' dans le vocabulaire informatique ?
options: To press and release a button on the mouse
explanation: To click means to press and release a button on the mouse. You click to select or open items on the screen.

questionText:
What does the verb 'save' mean in computing?
Que signifie le verbe 'save' en informatique ?
options: To store a file on the computer
explanation: To save means to store a file on the computer so you can access it later. It is important to save your work regularly.

questionText:
Which part of the computer is considered the 'brain' of the computer?
Quelle partie de l'ordinateur est considérée comme le 'cerveau' de l'ordinateur ?
explanation: The CPU is considered the brain of the computer. It processes all the information and controls all the other parts.

questionText:
What is the correct sequence to turn on a computer?
Quelle est la séquence correcte pour allumer un ordinateur ?
options: Turn on the monitor, then the CPU.
Turn on the CPU, then the monitor.
Turn on the printer, then the CPU.
Turn on the keyboard, then the screen.
explanation: The correct sequence is: First, turn on the monitor, then turn on the CPU. This way, you can see the start-up process on the screen.

questionText:
Read the instruction: 'Turn off the computer properly.' What does this mean?
Lisez l'instruction : 'Éteignez l'ordinateur correctement.' Qu'est-ce que cela signifie ?
options: Use the shut down option in the operating system.
Unplug the computer from the wall.
explanation: Turning off the computer properly means using the shut down option in the operating system. This ensures that all programs are closed safely and data is not lost.

questionText:
Which of the following is NOT a basic part of a computer?
Lequel des éléments suivants n'est PAS une partie de base d'un ordinateur ?
explanation: A telephone is not a basic part of a computer. The basic parts include the keyboard, mouse, screen, and CPU.

questionText:
What is the meaning of the word 'type' in computer vocabulary?
Que signifie le mot 'type' dans le vocabulaire informatique ?
explanation: To type means to write using the keyboard. You type text when you are writing an email, a document, or a message.

questionText:
Which of these is a common instruction you might find in a computer manual?
Lequel de ces éléments est une instruction courante que vous pourriez trouver dans un manuel d'ordinateur ?
explanation: 'Click here to print.' is a common instruction in a computer manual. It tells you where to click to print a document.

questionText:
What is the function of the 'printer'?
Quelle est la fonction de l'imprimante ?
options: To produce a paper copy of a document.
explanation: The printer is used to produce a paper copy of a document. It prints the text and images from your computer onto paper.
